rules: domains share one capital contract and one broker policy layer
domain agents coordinate families and wake-sleep states
the global coordinator is the only layer allowed to wake a reserve domain in place of a sleeping or degraded primary domain

notes: Core is a shared library, not a central runtime owner.
Every microbot keeps its own runtime, kill-switch and local safeguards.
Rollout preflight is orchestrated by TOOLS\PREPARE_MT5_ROLLOUT.ps1.
Default repo presets stay safe with InpEnableLiveEntries=false.
Truly live presets are generated consciously by TOOLS\GENERATE_ACTIVE_LIVE_PRESETS.ps1.
Transfer delivery is validated as PACKAGE plus HANDOFF and can be zipped separately.
FX, METALS and INDICES are now active local runtime domains inside the same organism.
Core capital may now be set manually through CONFIG\core_capital_contract_v1.json and applied globally to Common Files.
Global session and capital rhythm is now published through CONFIG\session_capital_coordinator_v1.json and projected to Common Files at domain scope.
